parameters.query: SELECT * FROM web_intel.weekly_performance ORDER BY week_start DESC LIMIT 8

SELECT tk.keyword, tk.priority, dr.collected_date, dr.position FROM web_intel.tracked_keywords tk JOIN web_intel.daily_rankings dr ON tk.id = dr.keyword_id WHERE dr.collected_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '28 days' AND tk.status = 'active' ORDER BY tk.keyword, dr.collected_date

parameters.columns: trend_type, name, description, direction, magnitude, data_points, is_active
